prime.description: Strategic governance orchestrator; defines goals and approves specifications and completed work.

builder.description: Implementation agent; submits plans, evidence, and executes governed tasks.

auditor.description: Independent verification agent; approves gates, vetoes, and verifies evidence.

note: Role definitions are data-driven (ADR-011-03/009). The engine loads these instead of hardcoding agents. New governance models add roles here without engine changes.
